title: chore(deps): update dependency rollup to v1.6.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| rollup | devDependencies | minor | [`1.4.0` -> `1.6.0`](https://diff.intrinsic.com/rollup/1.4.0/1.6.0) | [source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rollup/rollup</summary>

### [`v1.6.0`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​160)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.5.0...v1.6.0)

_2019-03-08_

##### Features

-   Add plugin hook to modify output options ([#​2736](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2736))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2736](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2736): Add hook for modifying OutputOptions ([@​Comandeer](https://togithub.com/Comandeer))

### [`v1.5.0`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​150)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.4.2...v1.5.0)

_2019-03-07_

##### Features

-   Allow resolving to a different id while marking it as external at the same time ([#​2734](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2734))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2734](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2734): Allow resolveId to return an object ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.4.2`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​142)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.4.1...v1.4.2)

_2019-03-07_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Respect variable identity of exports when hashing ([#​2741](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2741))
-   Resolve a situations where a variable was imported twice with the same name ([#​2737](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2737))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2741](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2741): Fix hashing when different variable are exported using the same name ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2737](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2737): Fix duplicate imports with conflicting names ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.4.1`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​141)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.4.0...v1.4.1)

_2019-03-04_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Do not treat the import target "" as external by default ([#​2733](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2733))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2733](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2733): Do not treat the import target "" as external by default ([@​LongTengDao](https://togithub.com/LongTengDao))

</details>
